workLog.task: Issue #2006: security review verdict was a final line; output-budget truncation dropped it, parser fell through to NEEDS_REVIEW and blocked a substantively-PASS PR
workLog.outcome: Reworded the canonical security axis prompt to emit a single VERDICT line FIRST (truncation-robust), removed the trailing duplicate, regenerated the CI prompt and copilot copy, and added a regression test against the captured PR #2004 truncated output. Parser unchanged per issue scope.
